name: ambient-library
description: Coach Lou's ambient skill library for Claude Code: project setup, skill selection, management, and code review through natural language.

plugins.name: ambient
plugins.description: Ambient skill library — project setup, skill selection, management, and code review, all through natural language.

plugins.name: aimm-commands
plugins.description: Library of 54 named AIMM prompt commands (skeptic, canon-lock, blind-spot-scanner, transcript-miner, ...); use for "/aimm:<name>", "run the skeptic", or any request naming an AIMM command.

plugins.name: aimm-newsletter
plugins.description: Sends a newsletter email to all members of a named Google Contacts group; use for "send this to [group]", "send the newsletter", "email the group". Previews recipients and content before sending.

plugins.name: aimm-writing-team
plugins.description: Autonomous multi-role team (Researcher, Strategist, Writer, Editor, Publisher) for thought-leadership articles; use for explicit role commands like "Use Strategist mode" or a full AIMM article run.

plugins.name: audit-fix
plugins.description: Adversarial six-lens audit (errors, omissions, oversights, blind spots, conflicts, duplications) of a plan or change, then root-cause fixes; use for "audit this", "pressure test", "poke holes", "what did we miss".

plugins.name: audit-mcp
plugins.description: Security-audits a third-party MCP server repo before installation; use for "audit this MCP", "is this MCP safe", "check this repo before I install it".

plugins.name: brand-writing-team
plugins.description: Multi-role team for brand-building long-form content with structured intake, end to end; use for "help me write a post about X", "turn this idea into a piece" when the goal is personal/company brand.

plugins.name: cognitive-operations
plugins.description: Applies the Lenses/Operations/Recipes structured-thinking system to complex problems and decisions; use for "think through", "what am I missing", "run a pre-mortem", "use mental models".

plugins.name: context-mgr
plugins.description: Installs the multi-agent .context/ continuity system into a project; use for "install context-mgr", "set up multi-agent context here", "scaffold .context/", "add the shared brain to this project".

plugins.name: conversation-consolidation-system
plugins.description: Builds a four-stage pipeline turning scattered Claude chat history into a searchable Obsidian external brain; use for "I can't find what I discussed with Claude", "second brain for my AI work".

plugins.name: conversation-ip-extractor
plugins.description: Extracts named frameworks, methodologies, and publishable IP from a long conversation or session transcript; use for "what did I figure out here", "find the framework in this".

plugins.name: deep-comprehension-assessment
plugins.description: Builds rigorous text-comprehension assessments with detailed feedback; use for "test my understanding of this text", "comprehension quiz".

plugins.name: deep-field
plugins.description: Integrated insight system combining Eigenthinking, latent-space cartography, and wisdom-of-crowds validation; use for "run deep field", frontier-quality insight beyond default reasoning.

plugins.name: editor
plugins.description: Surgically edits an EXISTING draft; use for "edit this draft", "polish this", "tighten this article". Requires a draft to already exist.

plugins.name: eigenthinking
plugins.description: Nine-step framework turning tacit expertise into branded, publishable IP (UP to IP); use for "turn how I think into a framework", "package my methodology", "make my process teachable".

plugins.name: enrich-prompt
plugins.description: Rewrites and augments a prompt to surface implicit constraints and blind spots, then answers the enriched version; use for "make this prompt better", "I keep getting shallow answers".

plugins.name: extract-codify-patterns
plugins.description: Packages a working session into a shareable look-over-my-shoulder artifact bundle; use for "package this session", "codify this session", "turn this conversation into a teaching resource".

plugins.name: fresh-eyes
plugins.description: Validates docs/onboarding/workflows by spawning a zero-context agent to walk through them cold, then fix-and-respawn; use for "fresh eyes", "does the onboarding work", "test the docs".

plugins.name: geo-authority-architect
plugins.description: Builds a GEO/AI-citation authority strategy and Canon/Frameworks/Diagnostics content architecture; use for "GEO strategy", "get cited by AI", "GEARS".

plugins.name: grill
plugins.description: Converges on a decision or spec via one high-leverage question at a time with a decisions ledger, then executes; use for "grill me", "interview me", "ask me questions one at a time".

plugins.name: ireport
plugins.description: Generates styled, interactive HTML research reports from a topic or notes; use for "interactive report", "HTML report on X", "deep research document".

plugins.name: irreplaceable-edge
plugins.description: Guided live discovery of a professional's irreplaceable competitive edge against AI-first competition; use for "find my edge", "what's my moat", "how do I compete with AI".

plugins.name: knowledge-base-architect
plugins.description: Guides design and deployment of a personal AI knowledge base from accumulated expertise assets; use for "talk to my own knowledge", "build a private ChatGPT on my material".

plugins.name: latent-cartographer
plugins.description: Multi-phase latent-space traversal that maps the probability landscape before answering; use for "/lsc", "run the cartographer", "don't give me the median answer".

plugins.name: leaderize-storytelling-framework
plugins.description: Selects and applies storytelling frameworks for Leaderize's mid-level-leader audience across content stages and live sessions; use for Leaderize content or session design.

plugins.name: meeting-nuggets
plugins.description: Turns meeting transcripts into newsletter-style topic recaps with research add-ons and optional Notion publishing; use for "recap this meeting", "session report", or any pasted VTT/call transcript.

plugins.name: multi-model-debate-live
plugins.description: Orchestrates a live human-steered Claude/Gemini/Codex debate against one shared markdown file; use for "three-pane terminal", "run the models against each other" — the live workflow, not the prompt protocol.

plugins.name: paradigm-collision-engine
plugins.description: Generates non-obvious insight by colliding 400+ disciplinary paradigms via parallel sub-agents and an elimination tournament; use for "fresh angle on X", "non-obvious take", "multiple lenses".

plugins.name: polyglot-language-coach
plugins.description: Gently coaches when the user writes in a non-English language mid-conversation — corrects, teaches, logs, returns to task; applies whenever the user code-switches as practice.

plugins.name: project-brief
plugins.description: Creates a one-page project overview; use for "write a brief", "summarize this project", "project overview", "what is this project".

plugins.name: researcher
plugins.description: Gathers sources into a structured research dossier; use for "research this topic", "find sources on X", "compile background". NOT for writing or editing the piece.

plugins.name: session
plugins.description: Runs session check-in/check-out against a project's .context/ store; use for "what should I work on", "resume work", "checkpoint", "session check-in/check-out". Requires (or offers to bootstrap) a .context/ directory.

plugins.name: transcript-to-content-pipeline
plugins.description: Turns a raw transcript or session notes into a full content package (article, LinkedIn variants, summary, audio script); use for "turn this into content", "write something from this transcript".

plugins.name: trello-pipeline
plugins.description: Trello-based agentic product pipeline turning an idea into a PRD via staged AI agents on a live board; use for "run the Trello pipeline", "idea to PRD on my board", "set up the TrelloAgents board".

plugins.name: voice-crm-pipeline
plugins.description: Builds a hands-free voice-to-database capture chain (Siri to Shortcut to GPT to Sheets); use for "I never update my CRM", "talk to my database", "voice-to-sheet workflow".

plugins.name: voice-profile-trainer
plugins.description: Derives a reusable voice profile from authentic writing samples so AI output sounds like the user; use for "doesn't sound like me", "write in my voice", "set up my voice profile".

plugins.name: wrap
plugins.description: Full session close-out ritual — commit, export conversation, teaching narrative, handoff, memory harvest; use for "wrap up", "close out", "export this conversation". For a plain .context/ checkpoint, prefer session.

plugins.name: writer
plugins.description: Drafts a piece from a brief (and optional dossier) — drafting ONLY, no research or editing pass; use for "draft this", "write a first draft from these notes", "turn this brief into a post".

plugins.name: writing-team
plugins.description: Full research -> draft -> edit pipeline to a publish-ready piece; use for "write me an article on X end to end", "take this from idea to finished post". Use this when the user wants the whole pipeline, not a single stage.

plugins.name: writing-suite
plugins.description: Bundle: the complete writing toolkit — researcher, writer, editor, project-brief, voice-profile-trainer, and the writing-team orchestrator.
